# Dependencies: Form 1040 Line 17 — Alternative Minimum Tax / Schedule 2 line 3 (2025)

> Authoritative source: `lines/17.md`. Re-authored 2026-06-14.
>
> **Implementation site:** `computeLine17()` at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:16773` (orchestrator; ~565 lines). Call site at `prepare()` line 1621. Initial wire via `wireLine17ToOutputs()` (line 17276); post-FTC re-wire via `correctLine17ForFtc()` (line 17312); Part III via `populateAmtPartIIIFields()` (line 17617).
>
> **Line 17 is NOT AMT-only.** It is `Schedule 2 line 3 = line 1z + line 2 (= Form 6251 line 11)`. Currently `line 1z = 0` because all PTC repayment / clean-vehicle dealer / Form 4255 items in line 1z are deferred, so effectively `Form1040.line17 = Form6251.line11`.

## 1. Direct Inputs

| Input | Source | Backend field | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Form1040.line11b` | `computeAGI()` | `AGI.line11b` | Form 6251 line 1b base (AMTI starting point) |
| `Form1040.line14` | `computeLine14()` | `Deductions.line14` | Form 6251 line 1a input (deductions) |
| `Schedule1A.line37` | `computeSchedule1A()` | `AdditionalDeductions.line37` | Senior enhanced deduction add-back at line 1a |
| `filingStatus` | `filing-status` personal form | `filingStatus` | Exemption, phaseout, breakpoint, FEITW path |
| `isItemizing` | Schedule A compute | `Deductions.isItemizing` | Controls line 2a path |
| `ScheduleA.line7` | Schedule A compute | `ScheduleA.line7` | Line 2a when itemizing (post-SALT-cap deductible taxes) |
| `Form1040.line12e` | `computeLine12()` | `Deductions.line12e` | Line 2a when NOT itemizing (G1 2025 fix — std ded add-back for non-itemizers) |
| `Schedule1.line1` | `computeSchedule1()` | `Schedule1.line1` | State/local tax refund in income → negative line 2b |
| 1099-INT box 9 (PAB interest) | Statement entries | `pabInterest` (taxpayer + spouse + dependents) | Line 2g preference item |
| `Form1040.line16` | `computeLine16()` | `TaxAndCredits.tax` | Line 10 regular tax base |
| `Form 8962 line 29` | `computeForm8962()` | `ptcRepayment` | Line 10 addition (also wired to `Schedule2.tax.excessAdvancePremiumTaxCreditRepayment`) |
| `Form4972.line30Total` | `computeForm4972()` | `TaxAndCredits.box2Form4972Tax` | Line 10 subtraction |
| `Schedule3.line1` | `applyForeignTaxCreditToSchedule3()` | `nc.foreignTaxCredit` | Line 10 subtraction (applied via `correctLine17ForFtc`; G3 fix) |
| `form2555Taxpayer` | `computeForm2555()` | `form2555Taxpayer` | Triggers FEITW path (line 7 method #1) |
| `form2555Spouse` | `computeForm2555()` | `form2555Spouse` | Triggers FEITW (MFS-shadowed at call site; 17 #1) |

## 2. Conditional Inputs

| Form | Field | Condition |
|---|---|---|
| `ScheduleD.line15` | `ScheduleD.netLongTermCapitalGainOrLoss` | PART_III path (LTCG present) |
| `ScheduleD.line16` | `ScheduleD.netCapitalGainOrLoss` | PART_III path |
| `ScheduleD.line19` | `ScheduleD.unrecapturedSection1250GainAmount` | PART_III line 14 (§1250 exclusion; G-new-4 fix) |
| `Form1040.income.qualifiedDividends` | Line 3a | PART_III path trigger |

## 3. Outputs

| Output field | Model location | Consumer |
|---|---|---|
| `TaxAndCredits.alternativeMinimumTax` | `form1040.taxAndCredits` | Tax Return view; Form 8801 |
| `TaxAndCredits.additionalTaxSchedule2` | Same | **PDF line 17 field** (set by `wireLine17ToOutputs`; G2 fix) — line 18 reads this |
| `Schedule2.tax.alternativeMinimumTax` | `schedule2.tax` | Schedule 2 line 2 PDF |
| `Schedule2.tax.excessAdvancePremiumTaxCreditRepayment` | Same | Schedule 2 line 1a PDF (PTC repayment) |
| `Form6251.line1a` through `Form6251.line40` | `form6251` | Tax Return display + PDF (Part III lines 12–40 only when PART_III path) |

## 4. PDF Fields

Form 6251 (via `f6251_field_map_semantic.csv`):

| CSV key | Description |
|---|---|
| `f6251_line1a` | Line 1a — `line14 − Schedule1A.line37` |
| `f6251_line1b` | Line 1b — `line11b − line1a` |
| `f6251_line2a` | Line 2a — Schedule A line 7 OR `line12e` (G1 fix) |
| `f6251_line2b` | Line 2b — negative state/local refund |
| `f6251_line2g` | Line 2g — PAB interest |
| `f6251_line4` | AMTI |
| `f6251_line5` | Exemption (with phaseout) |
| `f6251_line6` | AMTI − exemption |
| `f6251_line7` | Tentative minimum tax (FEITW / PART_III / 26-28%) |
| `f6251_line8` | AMT FTC (currently 0; deferred) |
| `f6251_line9` | line7 − line8 |
| `f6251_line10` | Regular tax comparison (line16 + ptcRepayment − Form4972 − FTC) |
| `f6251_line11` | AMT = max(0, line9 − line10) |
| `f6251_line12`..`f6251_line40` | Part III bracket arithmetic (populated only on PART_III path) |

Form 1040 (via `f1040_field_mapping_semantic.csv`):

| CSV key | Description |
|---|---|
| `line17_amount_from_schedule2_line3` | Line 17 amount — reads `additionalTaxSchedule2` |

## 5. Compute Order

```text
Form1040.line15 (taxable income)
    ↓
computeLine16()  →  TaxAndCredits.tax  (line 16)
    ↓
computeLine17() [orchestrator ~565 lines]:
    line1a = line14 − Schedule1A.line37
    line1b = line11b − line1a
    line2a = ScheduleA.line7 (itemizing) OR line12e (G1 fix)
    line2b = −Schedule1.line1
    line2g = PAB interest
    line4  = AMTI (line1b + 2a + 2b + 2g + ...)
    line5  = exemption with 25% phaseout
    line6  = max(0, line4 − line5)
    line7  = FEITW  OR  PART_III via populateAmtPartIIIFields()  OR  direct 26/28%
        (form2555Spouse null-shadowed for MFS — 17 #1)
    line8  = AMT FTC (= 0; deferred)
    line9  = line7 − line8
    line10 INITIAL = line16 + ptcRepayment − Form4972.line30   [FTC subtracted later]
    line11 INITIAL = max(0, line9 − line10)
    ↓
wireLine17ToOutputs(line11):
    alternativeMinimumTax = line11
    additionalTaxSchedule2 = line11                           ← G2 fix
    Schedule2.tax.alternativeMinimumTax = line11
    Schedule2.tax.excessAdvancePremiumTaxCreditRepayment = Form8962 line 29
    ↓
computeLine18() PRIMARY  (line18 = line16 + line17)
    ↓
computeForm1116()  +  applyForeignTaxCreditToSchedule3()  →  Schedule3.line1 = FTC
    ↓
correctLine17ForFtc() [if FTC > 0]:                          ← G3 + G-new-1
    line10 -= Schedule3.line1
    line11Corrected = max(0, line9 − line10)
    wireLine17ToOutputs(line11Corrected)
    computeLine18() SECONDARY refresh                        ← G-new-1
    ↓
Downstream CLW-consuming forms (Form 8801, Form 8880, Schedule 8812, Form 2441, Form 8863) read refreshed totalTaxBeforeCredits
```

Both call sites for `computeLine18`: PRIMARY at `prepare()` line 1653; SECONDARY inside `correctLine17ForFtc` at line 17345.

## 6. 2025 AMT Constants

| Constant | Value |
|---|---|
| Exemption — Single / HOH | 88,100 |
| Exemption — MFJ / QSS | 137,000 |
| Exemption — MFS | 68,500 |
| Phaseout start — Single / HOH | 626,350 |
| Phaseout start — MFJ / QSS | 1,252,700 |
| Phaseout start — MFS | 626,350 |
| Phaseout rate | 25% per dollar over threshold |
| Exemption fully phased out — Single / HOH | 978,750 |
| Exemption fully phased out — MFJ / QSS | 1,800,700 |
| Exemption fully phased out — MFS | 900,350 |
| 26%/28% breakpoint — Non-MFS | 239,100 |
| 26%/28% breakpoint — MFS | 119,550 |
| Direct-offset shortcut — Non-MFS | 4,782 |
| Direct-offset shortcut — MFS | 2,391 |
| Part III 0% ceiling — Single / MFS | 48,350 |
| Part III 0% ceiling — MFJ / QSS | 96,700 |
| Part III 0% ceiling — HOH | 64,750 |
| Part III 20% floor — Single | 533,400 |
| Part III 20% floor — MFS | 300,025 (= half of MFJ 600,050; G5 spec fix) |
| Part III 20% floor — MFJ / QSS | 600,050 |
| Part III 20% floor — HOH | 566,700 |

## 7. Gaps

| Gap | Severity | Status |
|---|---|---|
| G1: `line2a = 0` for non-itemizers; should be `line12e` (std deduction) | HIGH | **Fixed 2026-04-18** |
| G2: `additionalTaxSchedule2` never set in `wireLine17ToOutputs`; PDF line 17 blank | MEDIUM | **Fixed 2026-04-18** |
| G3: `line10` missing `− Schedule3.line1` (FTC) | MEDIUM | **Fixed 2026-04-18** (via `correctLine17ForFtc`) |
| G4: Part III AMT QDCG rates not implemented | MEDIUM | **Closed — not a gap** (`computeAmtPartIII` fully implemented) |
| G5: Spec MFS line 25 threshold `300,000` → `300,025` (Rev. Proc. 2024-40 §3.09) | LOW | **Fixed — spec only, 2026-04-18** |
| G-new-1: `totalTaxBeforeCredits` stale after FTC correction | MEDIUM | **Fixed 2026-04-18** (`computeLine18` added to `correctLine17ForFtc`) |
| G-new-2: Form 6251 Part III lines 12–40 all null | MEDIUM | **Fixed 2026-04-18** (`populateAmtPartIIIFields`) |
| G-new-4: `computeAmtPartIII` included §1250 in preferential pool | MEDIUM | **Fixed 2026-04-18** (line 14 excludes §1250; rate at line 37) |
| G-new-5: `additionalTaxSchedule2 = line11` only; should be `line1z + line11` | HIGH | **Open** — propagation fix at `wireLine17ToOutputs` |
| G-new-6: Form 8978 line 14 negative not subtracted from Form 6251 line 10 | MEDIUM | **Open** — BLOCKED on Form 8978 |
| G-new-7: Schedule 1 line 8z refund breadth not in line 2b | MEDIUM | **Open** |
| MFS Form 2555 spouse leak in line 7 FEITW path | HIGH | **Fixed 2026-05-14** (17 #1 — null-shadow at call site lines 1594-1620) |
